chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1929 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 16.12.2025 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Additional AG files statements / comments on behalf of Respondents 6 and 7, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the Petitioner. Allah Bux Sahito, Chairman, Union Council, Jam Noorullah Taluka Kandiaro is present and submits that on approach of the Petitioner within one week the Wheel Chair will be provided to him. On such undertaking, the petition is disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
